canonical_text:
L2_BIBLE_SAMUEL_001-S01: said to Nathan, As the LORD liveth, the man that hath done this thing shall surely die: 12:6 And he shall restore the lamb fourfold, because he did this thing, and because he had no pity.
L2_BIBLE_SAMUEL_001-S02: 12:7 And Nathan said to David, Thou art the man. Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, I anointed thee king over Israel, and I delivered thee out of the hand of Saul; 12:8 And I gave thee thy master’s house, and thy master’s wives into thy bosom, and gave thee the house of Israel and of Judah; and if that had been too little, I would moreover have given unto thee such and such things.
edition: Project Gutenberg eBook #10, King James Version Old Testament text
fixed_context: focal parable application plus immediate divine indictment
rights_note: Execution-preparation packet uses public-domain Project Gutenberg source text. Public release or redistribution outside this repository review still requires source-specific rights audit.

segments.text: said to Nathan, As the LORD liveth, the man that hath done this thing shall surely die: 12:6 And he shall restore the lamb fourfold, because he did this thing, and because he had no pity.

12:7 And Nathan said to David, Thou art the man. Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, I anointed thee king over Israel, and I delivered thee out of the hand of Saul; 12:8 And I gave thee thy master’s house, and thy master’s wives into thy bosom, and gave thee the house of Israel and of Judah; and if that had been too little, I would moreover have given unto thee such and such things.

source_citation: 2 Samuel, King James Version. Project Gutenberg eBook #10, King James Version Old Testament text. Source lines 27608-27617. Retrieved 2026-07-02.

Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, I anointed thee king over Israel, and I delivered thee out of the hand of Saul; 12:8 And I gave thee thy master’s house, and thy master’s wives into thy bosom, and gave thee the house of Israel and of Judah; and if that had been too little, I would moreover have given unto thee such and such things.
